headline: There’s a New Stock to Play the AI Power Boom, and It’s Down Today
summary: Newly-listed power company ERock could appeal to investors looking for another way to play the AI boom.  Erock started trading on the New York Stock Exchange around midday on Wednesday, slipping 5% in early action.  ERock makes natural gas-powered engines and generators that can be placed on-site at data centers or other large businesses to provide electricity.

headline: Mainspring Appoints Former Cummins Chairman and CEO Tom Linebarger as CEO and Founder Shannon Miller as President to Power Next Wave of Growth
summary: Shannon Miller, the founding CEO of Mainspring Energy, has spent fifteen years reinventing the way the world turns fuel into electricity. Mainspring's linear generators are fuel-flexible, highly efficient, and low-emissions, making them uniquely suited to meet today's unprecedented demand for power, driven by the race for AI dominance, the global transition to electrification, and the rise of onshore manufacturing. headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid CMI and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since June 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 74.5%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Cummins has surged 165% to $668.50 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 27.4% in the last six months, beating the S&P by 19.9%.

headline: A Look At Cummins (CMI) Valuation After A Powerful One Year Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance snapshot Cummins (CMI) has drawn fresh attention after a strong past year, with the stock up about 108% on a total return basis and around 28% year to date. Over the shorter term, the share price is down roughly 1% over the past week and about 2% over the past month, while the past 3 months show a gain of about 20%. See our latest analysis for Cummins. headline: Cummins Leadership Under Spotlight As CEO Joins 3M Board
summary: Cummins (NYSE:CMI) Chair and CEO Jennifer Rumsey has been appointed to 3M's Board of Directors. The appointment expands Rumsey's governance responsibilities across two large industrial companies. The move highlights external interest in Cummins' leadership at the board level. Cummins, through its engine, power systems, and related technologies, sits at the center of key industrial and energy supply chains. The appointment of Jennifer Rumsey to 3M's board puts a spotlight on how Cummins'...

headline: 1 Industrials Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Industrials businesses quietly power the physical things we depend on, from cars and homes to e-commerce infrastructure. But their prominence also brings high exposure to the ups and downs of economic cycles. Luckily, the tide is turning in their favor as the industry’s 14.5% return over the past six months has topped the S&P 500 by 7 percentage points.
